statement: In every magma, Equation 2320 (`x = (y * (x * (z * z))) * z`) implies Equation 118 (`x = y * ((x * y) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0750
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op x (op z z))) z)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op x y) y))
